On August 15, 1947, the absolute, most incredibly massive, deeply emotional, and historically monumental event in the history of the subcontinent officially occurred. Escaping aggressive British prosecution for his massive involvement in the armed independence struggle, he aggressively sought refuge in Pondicherry.
